items.headline: Albemarle: A Different Storage Boom
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation is regaining momentum as lithium prices rebound, driven by surging energy storage systems (ESS) using lithium batteries to meet demand. ALB's Q1'26 results generated a $2.95 EPS and $664M adjusted EBITDA, with ESS now the primary growth engine amid flat EV s

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
items.snippet: Analyst support centered on expansion and productivity suggests that Albemarle's execution on projects and cost discipline will be important areas to watch. Citi and RBC highlighting expansion and productivity improvements suggests investors are watching how Albemarle converts it

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion 'Buy' - Citi
items.snippet: Citi raised its investment opinion on Albemarle (ALB), a global lithium producer, from 'High Risk' to 'Buy'. The target price remains at $225. Citi adjusted its estimates to reflect the lithium market outlook, analyzing that the market is underestimating Albemarle's growth potent

items.headline: Does Albemarle's Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand to witness a CAGR of 10-20% from 2025 to 2030. Stationary storage is expected to be a significant driver for lithium demand along with EVs. Albemarle expects demand to grow roughly 15-40% this year. Global Energy Storage Systems production rising 117% y

items.headline: Lithium mining concept stocks have all risen, with Albemarle (ALB) in the US up 4.83%.
items.snippet: Lithium mining concept stocks continued to rise across the board. Albemarle (ALB) in the US rose 4.83%. Citi pointed out that fundamental catalysts are emerging in the lithium battery industry chain. The restocking cycle in the short term will provide solid support for prices.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs. The company's cost reductions alongside higher lithium prices also continue to drive ea
